description: Get current weather and forecasts (no API key required).
description_zh: 获取当前天气和预报（无需API密钥）
name: Weather

description: Multi search engine integration with 17 engines (8 CN + 9 Global). Supports advanced search operators, time filters, site search, privacy engines, and WolframAlpha knowledge queries. No API keys required.
description_zh: 集成17个搜索引擎（8国内+9国际），支持高级搜索语法、时间筛选、站内搜索、隐私引擎及WolframAlpha知识查询，无需API密钥。
name: Multi Search Engine

description: Edit PDFs with natural-language instructions using the nano-pdf CLI.
description_zh: 使用nano-pdf CLI通过自然语言指令编辑PDF
name: Nano Pdf

description: Notion API for creating and managing pages, databases, and blocks.
description_zh: Notion API，用于创建和管理页面、数据库及区块
name: Notion

description: Control Sonos speakers (discover/status/play/volume/group).
description_zh: 控制Sonos音箱（发现/状态/播放/音量/分组）
name: Sonoscli

description: Work with Obsidian vaults (plain Markdown notes) and automate via obsidian-cli.
description_zh: 操作 Obsidian 仓库（纯 Markdown 笔记）并通过 obsidian-cli 自动化。
name: Obsidian

description: Search the web using Baidu AI Search Engine (BDSE). Use for live information, documentation, or research topics.
description_zh: 使用百度AI搜索引擎(BDSE)搜索网页，获取实时信息、文档资料或研究主题。
name: baidu web search

description: Design and implement automation workflows to save time and scale operations as a solopreneur. Use when identifying repetitive tasks to automate, building workflows across tools, setting up triggers and actions, or optimizing existing automations. Covers automation opportunity identification, workflow design, tool selection (Zapier, Make, n8n), testing, and maintenance. Trigger on "automate", "automation", "workflow automation", "save time", "reduce manual work", "automate my business", "no-code automation".
description_zh: 设计和实施自动化工作流，帮助个体创业者节省时间、扩展业务。适用于识别重复任务、跨工具搭建流程、配置触发器与动作、优化现有自动化等场景。涵盖自动化机会识别、工作流设计、工具选型（Zapier/Make/n8n）、测试与维护。触发词：automate、automation、workflow automation、save time、reduce manual work、automate my business、no-code automation。
name: Automation Workflows

description: Web search and content extraction via Brave Search API. Use for searching documentation, facts, or any web content. Lightweight, no browser required.
description_zh: 通过 Brave Search API 实现网页搜索与内容提取，适用于文档、事实及各类网络内容查询。轻量级，无需浏览器。
name: Brave Search

description: Web search via Tavily API (alternative to Brave). Use when the user asks to search the web / look up sources / find links and Brave web_search is unavailable...
description_zh: 通过 Tavily API 搜索网页（Brave 替代方案）。当用户需要搜索网络、查找来源或链接且 Brave 不可用时使用。
name: Tavily 搜索

description: Fetch and read transcripts from YouTube videos. Use when you need to summarize a video, answer questions about its content, or extract information from it.
description_zh: 获取YouTube视频字幕，用于总结视频、回答内容问题或提取信息。
name: YouTube Watcher

description: Advanced desktop automation with mouse, keyboard, and screen control
description_zh: 高级桌面自动化，支持鼠标、键盘和屏幕控制
name: Desktop Control

description: Connect OpenClaw to Outlook and Microsoft Graph for email, calendar, contacts, and folder operations using a pre-provided access token. Use when the user ask...
description_zh: 使用预提供的访问令牌将 OpenClaw 连接到 Outlook 和 Microsoft Graph，以执行邮件、日历、联系人和文件夹操作。
name: Outlook Graph

description: Manage Trello boards, lists, and cards via the Trello REST API.
description_zh: 通过 Trello REST API 管理看板、列表和卡片。
name: Trello

description: This skill should be used when the user asks for news updates, daily briefings, or what's happening in the world. Fetches news from trusted international RSS feeds and can create voice summaries.
description_zh: 适用于用户询问新闻更新、每日简报或全球动态时。从可信国际RSS源获取新闻，支持生成语音摘要。
name: News Summary

description: Sync and query CalDAV calendars (iCloud, Google, Fastmail, Nextcloud, etc.) using vdirsyncer + khal. Works on Linux.
description_zh: 使用 vdirsyncer + khal 同步查询 CalDAV 日历（iCloud、Google、Fastmail、Nextcloud 等）。支持 Linux。
name: Caldav Calendar

description: Manage Apple Notes via the `memo` CLI on macOS (create, view, edit, delete, search, move, and export notes). Use when a user asks Clawdbot to add a note, list notes, search notes, or manage note folders.
description_zh: 通过 macOS 的 `memo` CLI 管理 Apple 备忘录（创建、查看、编辑、删除、搜索、移动、导出）。当用户要求添加、列出、搜索备忘录或管理文件夹时使用。
name: Apple Notes

description: Create, inspect, and edit Microsoft Word documents and DOCX files with reliable styles, numbering, tracked changes, tables, sections, and compatibility check...
description_zh: 创建、检查和编辑 Word/DOCX 文档，支持样式、编号、修订追踪、表格、分节及兼容性检查。
name: Word / DOCX

description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit for extracting text and tables, creating new PDFs, merging/splitting documents, and handling forms. When Claude needs to fill in a PDF form or programmatically process, generate, or analyze PDF documents at scale.
description_zh: PDF综合处理工具，支持文本表格提取、创建、合并拆分及表单处理。适用于Claude填写PDF表单或批量处理、生成、分析PDF文档。
name: Pdf

description: Neural web search, content extraction, company and people research, code search, and deep research via the Exa MCP server. Use when you need to: (1) search t...
description_zh: 通过Exa MCP服务器进行神经网页搜索、内容提取、公司与人物调研、代码搜索及深度研究
name: Web Search by Exa

description: Manage LNbits Lightning Wallet (Balance, Pay, Invoice)
description_zh: 管理 LNbits 闪电钱包（余额、支付、收款）
name: LNBits Wallet wtih QR Code

description: This skill should be used when users need to search the web for information, find current content, look up news articles, search for images, or find videos. It uses DuckDuckGo's search API to return results in clean, formatted output (text, markdown, or JSON). Use for research, fact-checking, finding recent information, or gathering web resources.
description_zh: 用于搜索网络信息、新闻、图片及视频，通过DuckDuckGo API返回格式化结果（文本/Markdown/JSON）。适用于研究、事实核查和获取最新资讯。
name: Web Search

description: Performs web searches using DuckDuckGo to retrieve real-time information from the internet. Use when the user needs to search for current events, documentation, tutorials, or any information that requires web search capabilities.
description_zh: 使用DuckDuckGo进行网络搜索，获取实时互联网信息。适用于查询时事、文档、教程或任何需网络检索的内容。
name: Performs web searches using DuckDuckGo to retrieve real-time information from the internet. Use when the user needs to search for current events, documentation, tutorials, or any information that requires web search capabilities.

description: Manage Apple Reminders via the `remindctl` CLI on macOS (list, add, edit, complete, delete). Supports lists, date filters, and JSON/plain output.
description_zh: 通过 macOS 的 `remindctl` CLI 管理 Apple 提醒事项（列出、添加、编辑、完成、删除），支持多列表、日期筛选及 JSON/纯文本输出。
name: Apple Reminders
